sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n118" key="a)blhxh/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀβληχής</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ές</itype>, (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">βληχή</etym>) <sense id="n118.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">without bleatings,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">ἐπαύλιον</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">AP</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">9.149</biblScope> </bibl> </cit> (Antip.).</sense> </entryFree>
